Author: BlueWaveXIV
Name: AutoList
Description: AutoList turns retainer Market Board chores into supervised AutoList, AutoRefresh, and AutoTidy workflows with a small in-game tray that lights up when your character is ready to start.
Punchline: Turn retainer listing from market-board chore into one-click momentum.
Changelog:
Renamed the retainer tidy workflow to AutoTidy across UI, docs, command help, and internal code.
Renamed the tray buttons to AutoRefresh Listings and AutoTidy Listings.
Added AutoTidy hover helper text explaining that it tidies retainer sale listings.
